server.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
server.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
server.authorization: You do not have permission to do that.
server.not-found: That item could not be found.
server.conflict: That action conflicts with the current state. Refresh and try again.
server.version-conflict: Someone else changed this. Refresh and try again.
server.validation-failed: Some details are invalid. Please review and try again.
server.unauthenticated: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
server.rate-limited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
server.token-gone: That link or token is no longer valid.

notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
notFound.title: Page not found

unexpected.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.
unexpected.title: Something went wrong
